subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye, through the loving-kindness of the All-Merciful, be occupied at all times with the remembrance of the Beloved of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایه الرحمن در کل احیان بذکر محبوب عالمیان مشغول باشید دنیا و آنچه در
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @predictions and prophecies, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for protection, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
